recommendations.title: Non-combat time is 15:44 longer
recommendations.detail: Time between boss kills (trash, running, rebuffing) is significantly higher. Consider: pre-positioning, faster rebuffs, pulling trash while buffing, or assigning a pull leader.

recommendations.title: Morogrim Tidewalker: 1:12 slower
recommendations.detail: Their raid DPS was -4,885 compared to yours. Missing buffs: Blessing of Light, Blessing of Might, Blessing of Salvation, Divine Spirit, Leader of the Pack, Power Word: Fortitude, Prayer of Shadow Protection, Prayer of Spirit. Their overheal was -20.2% different.

recommendations.title: Lady Vashj: 1:42 slower
recommendations.detail: Their raid DPS was -1,346 compared to yours. Missing buffs: Blessing of Light, Blessing of Might, Divine Spirit, Leader of the Pack, Power Word: Fortitude, Prayer of Spirit. Their overheal was -17.0% different.

recommendations.title: Leotheras the Blind: 0:21 slower
recommendations.detail: Their raid DPS was -1,358 compared to yours. Missing buffs: Blessing of Light, Blessing of Might, Divine Spirit, Leader of the Pack, Mark of the Wild, Power Word: Fortitude, Prayer of Spirit.

recommendations.title: Trash pulls took 1:57 longer
recommendations.detail: Your raid spent 29:07 on trash vs their 27:10. Consider bigger pulls, more AoE, or skipping optional packs.

recommendations.title: The Lurker Below: Different Bloodlust timing (72% vs 5%)
recommendations.detail: You used Bloodlust at 72% of the fight, they used it at 5%. Earlier usage generally yields more total value unless there's a burn phase.

recommendations.title: Fathom-Lord Karathress: Different Bloodlust timing (6% vs 64%)
recommendations.detail: You used Bloodlust at 6% of the fight, they used it at 64%. Earlier usage generally yields more total value unless there's a burn phase.

recommendations.title: Morogrim Tidewalker: Different Bloodlust timing (17% vs 81%)
recommendations.detail: You used Bloodlust at 17% of the fight, they used it at 81%. Earlier usage generally yields more total value unless there's a burn phase.
